identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix wellness softness with data precision
Emotion First: Every screen must feel like a warm hug
Content is King: The boyfriend's messages and health tips are the heroes
Zoom In: Big, bold focus on daily stats and affirmations
Negative Space: Breathable layouts to reduce anxiety
Contrast: Soft pastels vs. crisp dark purple text for readability

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and big stats. Roundness = Cuteness.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and list items. Clean and legible.

layout.structure: Single column layout with bottom navigation bar for primary destinations.

buttons.style: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold shadow-sm transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

cards.style: rounded-[2rem] bg-white p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border-none transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.style: rounded-2xl border-[#E5D4FF] bg-[#FAFAFA] px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D8B4F8] focus:border-transparent text-[#5D4578] placeholder:text-[#D1D5DB]

navigation.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-[#F3E8FF] pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 rounded-t-[2rem]

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) to add warmth
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Heart pop on like, confetti on streak, gentle pulse on emergency button

wellness_covers.description: Cute toys on table - Calm/Playful vibe

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install framer-motion lucide-react react-day-picker date-fns clsx tailwind-merge
SETUP_TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom color palette and border radius (rounded-3xl).
PWA_SETUP: Ensure manifest.json has the correct theme_color (#FDE2F3) and background_color.
ROUTING: Use React Router for navigation (Dashboard, Calendar, Food, Profile, Admin).
PRIVACY: Hardcode the login check. Store data in localStorage (or MongoDB as requested, but ensure offline first sync if possible).
AESTHETIC: Do NOT use sharp corners. Everything must be rounded. Use the pastel colors everywhere.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
